name: Structured Memory
description: Structured typed memory records with importance scoring and Weibull time-based decay.

enabled.label: Enable Structured Memory
enabled.help: Store and search structured typed memory records with importance scoring and automatic decay.

classification.model.label: Classification Model
classification.model.help: Optional provider/model for importance scoring. Defaults to agent primary model.

decay.minMaintenanceScore.label: Min Maintenance Score
decay.minMaintenanceScore.help: Records below this threshold are auto-archived during maintenance.
